meta.title: A unique golden textile
meta.sourceDoc: 34. P2 - A unique golden textile 蜘蛛丝.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: A unique golden textile 蜘蛛丝

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：vii
PDF 定位：vii A unique work of art
PDF 解析：段首即说"the resulting 11-foot-by-4-foot textile is the only large piece of cloth made from natural spider silk in the world today."突 出"唯一""稀有"的艺术品特征，因此选vii。

题目 15
答案：v
PDF 定位：v The physical properties of spider silk
PDF 解析：整段都在比较蜘蛛丝与钢、凯夫拉（Kevlar）的强度、弹性、延展性、轻 质等物理属性。

题目 16
答案：ix
PDF 定位：ix Difficulties of raising spiders in captivity
PDF 解析：句子"spider silk is extremely hard to mass-produce... spiders have a habit of biting off each other's heads when housed together." 直指饲养困难。

题目 17
答案：i
PDF 定位：i Experimenting with an old idea
PDF 解析：Peers受19世纪法国传教士Camboué的启发，复制其老式"silking machine"并加以试验，典型"旧概念上的新试验"。

题目 18
答案：iv
PDF 定位：iv Resources needed to meet the project's demands
PDF 解析：说明要扩大量产需"14ooospidersyieldaboutanounceofsilk.. handlershadworkedwithmorethanonemillionspiders",以及 人力、季节限制等资源投入。

题目 19
答案：vi
PDF 定位：vi A scientific analysis of spider silk
PDF 解析：既讨论基因工程尝试，也分析蜘蛛如何用spinneret施加力改变蛋白质 结构--典型科学机理分析。

questionSections.text:
题目 20
答案：B
PDF 定位：需要大量蜘蛛才能获得少量丝 B Nicholas Godley
PDF 解析：E段:"Fourteen thousand spiders yield about an ounce of silk, Godley said."

题目 21
答案：A
PDF 定位：科学家希望把蜘蛛丝用于医疗 A Simon Peers
PDF 解析：C 段:"According to Peers, there is intensiveresearch worldwide aimed at replicating spider-silk tensile properties for use in medicine and industry."

题目 22
答案：C
PDF 定位：人造蜘蛛丝方面已有一些进展 C Todd Blackledge
PDF 解析：F段:"Every year we getcloserto mass production, but we'renot there yet," Blackledge 评述目前进展虽有限但在改善。

题目 23
答案：A
PDF 定位：A Simon Peers 蜘蛛丝与高强度材料比较优越
PDF 解析：B 段:"the tensile strength of spider silk is even greater than Kevlar's...and higher than that of high-grade steel, said textile expert Simon Peers."

questionSections.text:
题目 24
答案：bacteria
PDF 定位/解析：bacteria F段:"Several groups have inserted spider genes into bacteria and even goats...

题目 25
答案：gland
PDF 定位/解析：gland F 段: ..iquid protein produced in a special gland in the abdomen."

题目 26
答案：force
PDF 定位/解析：force F 段: "Using the spinneret, the spider applies force that rearranges the protein's molecular structure, transforming it into solid fibre."
